pass_with_caveat_notes.R279: Trinidadian steel pan within-head harmonic-integer-ratio singular-direction constraint — zero LLM-side functional hits ≥0.7. Only Pattern-C surface-form semantic hit on Harmonic ML Models 2404.18825 (which uses 'harmonic' in Laplace-equation, not music-theoretic, sense). Verifier (a7a05fb963d51dafc) returned PASS (total_hits=0); primary returned FAIL_with_caveat at total_hits=1 via Pattern-C borderline. Within-head integer-ratio harmonic-series constraint on attention-head singular directions did not surface in surveyed LoRA / fine-tuning literature. Could be search-coverage gap or genuinely under-explored. Flagged for human review.
